summary: Iteration 19 - All new landing page features verified: Urgency Banner (47 places), ROI Calculator with 3 interactive sliders, AI Demo visual with Gemini Vision scan, Trust Badges (eFTI, GDPR, eIDAS). Admin and Driver dashboard regression passed.
passed_tests: Urgency banner visible at top (data-testid='urgency-banner') with '47 places' - PASS
3 sliders exist: trucks, litiges, cost (data-testid='slider-trucks', 'slider-litiges', 'slider-cost') - PASS
Slider values displayed: 5 camions, 3 litiges, 350€ (data-testid='slider-trucks-value', 'slider-litiges-value', 'slider-cost-value') - PASS
Total losses shown in red: -1 300€ (data-testid='total-losses') - PASS
Total savings shown in green: +1 090€ (data-testid='total-savings') - PASS
ROI conclusion text 'rentabilisé dès le premier jour' (data-testid='roi-conclusion') - PASS
CTA 'Arrêter de perdre de l'argent' button (data-testid='roi-cta-btn') - PASS
ROI CTA scrolls to pricing section - PASS
Sliders update losses/savings dynamically - PASS (9 trucks, 5 litiges → -2 200€ losses, +1 850€ savings)
AI Demo section exists (data-testid='ai-demo') with 'Démo IA Gemini Vision' - PASS
Trust badges section with eFTI, GDPR, eIDAS (data-testid='trust-badges') - PASS
Founder badge 'Tarif privilégié avant homologation complète' (data-testid='founder-badge') - PASS
Pricing shows correct prices: Solo 39€, Croissance 189€, Flotte Pro 489€ - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx: ROI Calculator correctly calculates losses (litiges * cost + trucks * 50€) and savings (80% litige + 100% carburant)
LandingPage.jsx: SliderInput component properly styled with blue gradient track and custom thumb
LandingPage.jsx: Urgency banner fixed at top with z-[60], nav positioned at top-[34px]
LandingPage.jsx: AI Demo visual has scan overlay with detection frame corners
LandingPage.jsx: Trust badges (eFTI, GDPR, eIDAS) displayed in row with descriptions
index.css: Range slider styling with webkit and moz prefixes for cross-browser support
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified new landing page features. ROI Calculator: 3 sliders (trucks 1-50, litiges 0-20, cost 100-2000€), default values 5/3/350, losses in red panel, savings in green panel, dynamic calculation. Urgency banner: 'Plus que 47 places disponibles' fixed at top. AI Demo: Gemini Vision scan visual with detection frame overlay. Trust badges: eFTI, GDPR, eIDAS in row. All dashboards working. Console shows Firestore permission errors but app functions correctly.
